graphlib/CycleError.name: CycleError
graphlib/CycleError.description: Subclass of ValueError raised by TopologicalSorter.prepare() if cycles exist in the working graph. If multiple cycles exist, only one undefined choice among them will be reported and included in the exception. The detected cycle can be accessed via the second element in the args attribute of the exception instance and consists in a list of nodes, such that each node is, in the graph, an immediate predecessor of the next node in the list. In the reported list, the first and the last node will ...
